title: MAX FPS Pro
description: MAX FPS Pro is the premium, high-end performance pack, optimized for 16 GB RAM systems and powerful rendering. It combines massive FPS with advanced shaders and high-quality visuals for the best possible experience.
body:
# MAX FPS Pro: The HIGH-END Performance & Visual Powerhouse

**Engineered by Z.XP.XP.900. Built for Dedicated Systems (16+ GB RAM) and Ultimate Aesthetics.**

MAX FPS Pro is the premium, high-end offering in the Z.XP.XP.900 performance lineup. This pack is designed for systems running **16GB or more of dedicated RAM** and powerful dedicated GPUs. It delivers maximum FPS while incorporating **advanced shader support, beautiful lighting, and the highest graphical fidelity** possible. This is the ultimate choice for content creators and players seeking the best possible visual and performance experience combined.

## ⚠️ CRUCIAL WARNING: Hardware Check

This modpack is built exclusively for **powerful, dedicated systems** with high-end CPUs and GPUs. **It is strongly advised NOT to test this pack on weak or integrated-graphics computers**, as the default high-stress configurations may result in a decrease in FPS and stability compared to the Lite or Balance tiers.

---

## ⚙️ Core Architecture: Graphics & Stability Focus

### A. High-Fidelity Rendering (Uncompromised Aesthetics)

* **Ultimate Visual Power:** This pack aims for **maximum FPS even on high chunk distances** and with **intensive shaders** (included in some versions).
* **Advanced Shader Support:** This pack fully supports and is pre-configured for **advanced shader integration (shaders are included in some versions)**, enabling complex water effects, dynamic shadows, and enhanced lighting, far beyond the Lite/Balance tiers.
* **Dedicated Resource Allocation:** Optimized configurations ensure the pack effectively utilizes the **16GB+ RAM**, minimizing lag and stuttering during high-stress rendering and chunk loading.

### B. Mod Stability Protocol

All included mods are carefully selected for **long-term stability and security**. If a mod fails to release stable support for the latest Minecraft version, it will be formally and permanently removed from this mod list to maintain the integrity and stability of the Pro experience. The mod list is **fixed and optimized for this version** to prevent conflicts.

## 💾 System Requirements & Target Audience

| System Component | Ideal Requirement | Target Performance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Dedicated RAM** | 16 GB or Higher | Consistent 120+ FPS with Shaders |
| **Goal** | Best Graphics, Zero Compromise | High-End Hardware Solution / Content Creation |

---

## 🔗 The Z.XP.XP.900 Performance Tiers (Select by System)

This **MAX FPS Series** is engineered for optimal performance on different hardware levels. **Install the pack that matches your RAM and performance goal:**

| Hardware Focus | Project Name | Project Link |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Ultra-Lite (2-3 GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/max-fps-lite) | [Install Now](https://modrinth.com/modpack/max-fps-lite) |
| **Mid-Tier (3-4 GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Balance](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-balance) | [Install Now](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-balance) |
| **High-End (16+ GB RAM)** | [MAX FPS Pro](https://modrinth.com/project/max-fps-pro) | **(Current Project)** |

---
# Mandatory Final Note

Thank you for selecting this optimized Modpack from Z.XP.XP.900. We are committed to high-performance competitive and utility Minecraft content, continually expanding our portfolio towards **100+ projects**!

---

## MANDATORY CREATOR CREDIT

Per the licensing agreement for this project, you are **required** to credit and explicitly mention the creator, **Z.XP.XP.900**, when using, promoting, or distributing this Modpack on any platform (streaming, video content, public lists).
